title: Russell Hobbs Food Collection Electric Hand Blender, 2 Speeds and Pulse Technology, Detachable blending leg for easy cleaning, Stainless steel blades, 200W, 22241
features: Two speeds for different food types.
Detachable plastic blending leg for easy cleaning.
Market research institute, retail hand blender sales value by product, October 2023 - September 2024.
Detachable plastic blending leg for easy cleaning
description: From the manufacturer Russell Hobbs 22241 Food Collection Hand Blender Do you love making soups, cakes and sauces? With the Russell Hobbs food collection hand blender you can do just that. Homemade food is the best kind and why not make it with ease? This hand blender hosts two speeds including pulse so that you can select the right speed for your creation whilst the stainless steel blades get hard at work chopping and slicing up your ingredients. It has a detachable shaft for easy cleaning so if you want to get cooking and baking here is the blender to help you get started. 200 W Power The 200 W of power is ample for blending a host of foods with optimum effect. Specifications 200 W power Stainless steel blades Detachable plastic blending leg Choice of two speed settings Product Features Detachable Blending Leg The plastic blending leg removes with ease, making cleaning your blender a breeze. Two Speed Settings A choice of two speed settings give you increased control when blending differing consistencies, making sure you achieve good results. Stainless Steel Blades The stainless steel blades ensure durability and performance. About Russell Hobbs At the heart of your home. At Russell Hobbs, products offer more than just quality, style and technology - they help create delicious moments to be savoured. That first cup of coffee in the morning, the warmth of a freshly ironed shirt, the simple joy of sharing a freshly cooked meal with family - these are the things that truly matter. Russell Hobbs put you at the heart of everything they do, which gives us the insight to design things better. From kettles and toasters to irons and food preparation, all their appliances offer ways to make life easier. They design with real people in mind, for solutions that help make home life even more enjoyable.
